name: Bobby Hebb
abstract: Robert Alvin Von Hebb (July 26, 1938 – August 3, 2010) was an American R&B and soul singer, songwriter and musician, best known for his 1966 hit "Sunny".

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Shorter
about_quotes.evidence: I said, “How did you get Bobby Hebb...where was Bobby Hebb...?” He said Bobby was not savvy at that time, you know. He wasn’t a businessman.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Shorter — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
